articles.title: Your Brain's Hidden 'Third Eye' Is a 600-Million-Year-Old Relic
articles.summary: New research reveals that all vertebrates evolved from a worm-like ancestor with a single median eye. That eye's remnant lives on as the pineal gland in your brain.

articles.title: Chatbots Are Giving Teens Dangerous Diet Advice, Study Finds
articles.summary: When prompted for weight-loss meal plans for teens, five popular AI chatbots consistently produced plans that were about 695 calories too low and nutritionally imbalanced, according to a new study in Frontiers in Nutrition.

articles.title: When Should You Use AI? New Study Says Timing Is Everything for Critical Thinking
articles.summary: People who used an AI chatbot only after partially working through a problem showed better critical thinking than those who used it from the start, unless they were under severe time pressure, a study presented at the 2026 CHI conference found.
